---
name: Diogo M. Camacho
phone: "+1 617 945 4383"
email: "diogo.camacho.2008@gmail.com"
github: diogocamacho
linkedin: diogocamacho
headcolor: 414141
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
urlcolor: blue
linkcolor: blue
output:
  vitae::awesomecv:
    keep_tex: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(vitae)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)

source("parse_resume.R")

# AZ-specific profile
PROFILE <- "az_cvrm"
```

# Executive Profile

`r parse_summary()`

```{r summary_highlights, results='asis'}
cat(parse_summary_highlights())
```

# Professional Experience

```{r experience}
parse_work(PROFILE) |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = what,
    when  = when,
    with  = with,
    where = where,
    why   = why,
    .protect = FALSE
  )
```

# Education

```{r education}
parse_education() |>
  detailed_entries(
    what  = what,
    when  = when,
    with  = with,
    where = where,
    .protect = FALSE
  )
```

# Publications and Patents

```{r publications, results='asis'}
cat(parse_publications())
```

`r parse_patents()`

Full publication list available on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=JjKJpygAAAAJ&hl=en) (6,770+ citations).

# Grants

`r parse_grants()`
